WARNING: EVT schematic (J316-EVTs). Some U-designators may differ from production boards. Verify against boardview (.brd) for physical placement. Pages marked ***OK2INTEGRATE*** have provisional data.
extraction_notes: Extracted from 155-page schematic PNGs. Same X2728 MLB platform as A2442 (J314). Pro/Max BOM variants noted where applicable.

ics.description: Main SoC. Pro has 8-core CPU + 14/16-core GPU. Max has 10-core CPU + 24/32-core GPU. OMIT_TABLE on page 15. Power domains: PCPU0/1, ECPU, GPU0/1, SRAM, DISP, DCS, VDD1, VDD2, VDDQ, AFR, ANE, CIO, Fabric, Fixed, VDDIO, VDD2H0, VDD2H1.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Component range: R57xx, C57xx, R58xx, C58xx.

Slave PMU with 22+ system bucks (BUCK0-BUCK21, BUCK15 not used on sC designs). VODCOM Vout=3.7V shared by SMC. VDDLOM Vout=0.8V (based on AN/BN OTP). Page 37: VIN/LDO/SW. Page 38: Bucks. Page 39: GPIO & GND.
Master PMU with 10+ system bucks (BUCK0-BUCK10). Has Pro vs Max BOM variant table. JM8170 companion IC nearby. Page 41: VIN/LDO/SW. Page 42: Bucks. Page 43: GPIO & GND.
ics.bom_variants: Pro and Max have different BOM options for GPU power phases

ics.description: Multi-phase voltage regulator controller for high-current SoC PCPU domains. NOT present on A2681. Controls power stages on pages 48-49. PVDDDOM signals for PWM/EN/FAULT. VIPER_BOOT, VIPER_GDML, VIPER_GSMWL signals route differential-twisted.

ics.function: Monaco multi-output VR — GPU/fabric/SoC dynamic domains
ics.description: Instance C0. SILICON:CFG = A0:A0, B0:D0. SILICON:OTP = A0:ZP_, B0:YP_. 10+ buck outputs. Custom Apple ORCT_TABLE IC. UA100 controller. XMA100/XMA101 power stages. Handles PPVDD_S0VE, S0VS, MCPW, S0CL, GACS + more. PP1V10_S1_CLVR_VDDH input from Viper MOPASS.

ics.function: Monaco multi-output VR — additional SoC domains
ics.description: Instance C1. CFG = A5. OTP = BP_. UA200 controller. XMA200/XMA201 power stages. Handles: PPVDD_S0DL, AGXS, S0KE, S0PE + more.
SC: Instance C2, CFG=C0, OTP=QP_. 1C: Instance C4, CFG=C1, OTP=RP_. 2C: Instance C4, CFG=C2, OTP=SP_. UA500/XMA500/501/502 power stages. Handles GPU SRAM, ANE SRAM, PCPU SRAM domains.
Main charger IC. Multi-FET input stage. Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON.
Produces PP5V_S2 (Vout-nom=5.14V, Iout Max=2.1A, f=1.25MHz). Low power option. Startup 4.7/7.5/10.5ms. XMC260 inductor. Component range: CC2xx, RC2xx.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0 (CD3217/M190CK)
ics.description: Left port 0. ORCT_TABLE IC with SPI ROM. CRITICAL. Component range: CF4xx, RF4xx. Port controller on page 71, high-speed on page 67.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1 (CD3217/M190CK)
ics.description: Left port 1. ORCT_TABLE IC with SPI ROM. Component range: CF5xx, RF5xx. Port controller on page 72, high-speed on page 68.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2 (CD3217/M190CK)
ics.description: RIGHT port. ORCT_TABLE IC. Component range: CG4xx, RG4xx. Port controller on page 80, high-speed on page 77. NOT present on A2681.
ATC0 high-speed controller. ORCT_TABLE IC on page 67. Handles USB-C high-speed AC coupling, retimer, and ATCRTMR0 connections.
ATC1 high-speed controller. ORCT_TABLE IC on page 68.
ATC2 high-speed controller. ORCT_TABLE IC on page 77. Right side port.
ACE port controllers for ATC0 and ATC1. Pages 69-70 show SPI/UART connections, port controller support. Bridge Arkanoid and Aardvarkanoid connectors.
Parrot 2 I2C/Reset level shifters for ATC0/ATC1. OMIT_TABLE IC. TBT LS RX/TX level shifters. SSR retimer connections.
Handles HDMI output. ORCT_TABLE IC. NOT present on A2681.
Controls SD card slot. SDCARD CONNECTOR 514-00175. OMIT_TABLE with HOST_SD_Q3004. NOT present on A2681.
Dedicated NAND controller. Two instances: SSD0 Ocarina (page 101) and SSD1 Ocarina (page 106). NOT present on A2681.
MagSafe connector. Q5401 MOSFET pair. Whamola support on page 29.
Secure Element IC. Same function as A2681 Ceres SE.
Located near U8100 (MPMU). OMIT_TABLE companion. Visible on page 41.
CLVR throttle support. CC000 bypass cap. RC000/RC001 MOSFETs for CLVR_PARROT_SLPCT_THROTTLE_L bypass.
Combined accelerometer and gyroscope. SPI interface with level translation (UE410/UE412/UE420). FLE400 ferrite.
Dual fan controllers. UE500 for FAN0 (left, JE500). UE510 for FAN1 (right, JE510). A2485-specific: dual fans for 16" thermal design. Dummy cooler connector also present.
SoC boot NOR flash. APN 1035S00604. PP1V225_AWAKE power.
Secure Enclave EEPROM. Write 6xOH, Read 8xKG. APN 3435000048. PP1V225_AWAKE_SEPROM power.
